import requests

# SEC EDGAR API - 获取Netflix (CIK: 0001065280) 的10-K filing
headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; Research/1.0; contact@research.local)'
}

# Netflix CIK (10位零填充: 0001065280)
cik = '0001065280'

# 获取最近提交的filings
url = f'https://data.sec.gov/api/xbrl/companyfacts/CIK{cik}.json'
resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=30)
print(f"SEC API状态: {resp.status_code}")

if resp.status_code == 200:
    data = resp.json()
    # 查找订阅数相关数据 (member 或 subscriber)
    facts = data.get('facts', {})
    for taxonomy, concepts in facts.items():
        for concept, details in concepts.items():
            if 'member' in concept.lower() or 'subscriber' in concept.lower():
                print(f"\nFound: {taxonomy}:{concept}")
                print(details.keys())
                break
        else:
            continue
        break
    
    # 列出所有可用的concepts
    print("\n可用concepts:")
    all_concepts = []
    for taxonomy, concepts in facts.items():
        for concept in concepts.keys():
            all_concepts.append(f"{taxonomy}:{concept}")
    print(all_concepts[:20])

url = f'https://data.sec.gov/api/xbrl/companyfacts/CIK{cik}.json'
resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=30)
print(f"SEC API状态: {resp.status_code}")

if resp.status_code == 200:
    data = resp.json()
    # 查找订阅数相关数据 (member 或 subscriber)
    facts = data.get('facts', {})
    for taxonomy, concepts in facts.items():
        for concept, details in concepts.items():
            if 'member' in concept.lower() or 'subscriber' in concept.lower():
                print(f"\nFound: {taxonomy}:{concept}")
                print(details.keys())
                break
        else:
            continue
        break
    
    # 列出所有可用的concepts
    print("\n可用concepts:")
    all_concepts = []
    for taxonomy, concepts in facts.items():
        for concept in concepts.keys():
            all_concepts.append(f"{taxonomy}:{concept}")
    print(all_concepts[:20])
